title: cosmea tenuifolia
intro: Cosmea tenuifolia, also known as Yellow Cosmos or Mexican Cosmos, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Cosmea tenuifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Cosmea tenuifolia often involve infusions, tinctures, or topical creams, which can be used to harness its therapeutic properties.
